curation_notes: Locations derived from the patch diff. The patch adds permission checks (FfiPermissions::check) and unstable API checks (check_unstable) to op_ffi_call_ptr and op_ffi_call_ptr_nonblocking in ext/ffi/lib.rs. These two functions were the only ones completely missing permission enforcement — other FFI ops already had permission checks but were only missing the unstable gate. The merge commit from PR #14115 was used as the patch commit, and its first parent as the pre-patch commit.
